steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: Cecily says old friends' absence can be endured with equanimity, but separation from new acquaintances is almost unbearable. The contrast shows that to endure something is to bear or accept it calmly.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: A is an emotional response, B means continue existing, and D means support or urge. The word in context means to put up with something difficult. The answer is C.
